channel.title: ProjectPrice Live Video Feed
channel.description: Project Price rotating short-form video feed for realtor and buyer estimate strategy.

item.title: Deal saver scenario | panel and wiring corrections in a recently flipped home | seller-completed repairs with Project Price estimate ranges
item.description: Project Price short-form video: Deal saver scenario | panel and wiring corrections in a recently flipped home | seller-completed repairs with Project Price estimate ranges. Realtor-led buyer guidance with immediate estimate ranges and repair negotiation context.
